scenario: caching layer across 3 service files in a Python web app

code_simplifier.reason: 3 files <= 5 threshold; single agent; runs before reviewers because it applies edits directly

code_reviewer.reason: standard track requires multiple independent reviewers; launched after simplifier completes

skill_rules_applied: standard_track: multiple independent code-reviewer agents in parallel
simplifier_runs_first: applies edits directly so reviewers see clean code
no_file_overlap: single simplifier agent prevents conflicting writes
fix_high_severity_directly: no approval gate after review
